title: AI 行业简报 2026-05-21
summary: 今天筛出 12 个事件：大厂动态 5 条，技术进展 2 条，行业观点 5 条；另读 Hugging Face Papers 7 篇。

today_focus.title: Google DeepMind：Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
today_focus.brief: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action。多个独立信号同时出现，可以先当成行业方向变化，而不是单条新闻。
evidence_titles: Gemini 3.5 Flash登陆OpenCode平台
Genuinely impressive release by Google today (remember when they were behind?)

Gemini 3.5 Flash is out, and it's a major jump over Gemini 3 Flash in model capability for knowledge work. We've been evaluating it on our Box AI Complex Work Eval in early release, and the model delivers a 12 percentage
Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
today_focus.source_display: X: Matt Turck · X: Aaron Levie

today_focus.title: OpenAI：Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
today_focus.brief: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
evidence_titles: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows

today_focus.title: DeepSeek：9亿次点击背后，AI应用的真实江湖｜2026中国AI应用全景图谱报告
today_focus.brief: 9亿次点击背后，AI应用的真实江湖｜2026中国AI应用全景图谱报告。这是中国模型厂商的有效信号，关键是能力变化能否进入稳定产品体验。
evidence_titles: 9亿次点击背后，AI应用的真实江湖｜2026中国AI应用全景图谱报告

items.title: UniT: Unified Geometry Learning with Group Autoregressive Transformer
items.title_zh: UniT: Unified Geometry Learning with Group Autoregressive Transformer
items.takeaway_zh: 《UniT: Unified Geometry Learning with Group Autoregressive Transformer》把生成模型推进到几何、3D 或动作生成场景。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: Adaptive Memory through Learning When and What to Generate
items.title_zh: Adaptive Memory through Learning When and What to Generate
items.takeaway_zh: 《Adaptive Memory through Learning When and What to Generate》研究模型如何自适应地产生和使用记忆。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: Evaluating Temporal Semantic Caching and Workflow Optimization in Agentic Plan-Execute Pipelines
items.title_zh: Evaluating Temporal Semantic Caching and Workflow Optimization in Agentic Plan-Execute Pipelines
items.takeaway_zh: 《Evaluating Temporal Semantic Caching and Workflow Optimization in Agentic Plan-Execute Pipelines》讨论 Agent 工作流中的缓存、规划执行和效率优化。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: Generative Recursive Reasoning
items.takeaway_zh: 《Generative Recursive Reasoning》围绕推理过程建模，探索更强的递归式问题求解。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: On the limits and opportunities of AI reviewers: Reviewing the reviews of Nature-family papers with 45 expert scientists
items.title_zh: On the limits and opportunities of AI reviewers: Reviewing the reviews of Nature-family papers with 45 expert scientists
items.takeaway_zh: 《On the limits and opportunities of AI reviewers: Reviewing the reviews of Nature-family papers with 45 expert scientists》评估 AI 在科研审稿场景里的能力和边界。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: SpecBench: Measuring Reward Hacking in Long-Horizon Coding Agents
items.title_zh: SpecBench: Measuring Reward Hacking in Long-Horizon Coding Agents
items.takeaway_zh: 《SpecBench: Measuring Reward Hacking in Long-Horizon Coding Agents》关注长程编码 Agent 的评测与奖励黑客问题。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: Generating 3D Human Motions by Freehand Drawing
items.title_zh: Generating 3D Human Motions by Freehand Drawing
items.takeaway_zh: 《Generating 3D Human Motions by Freehand Drawing》把生成模型推进到几何、3D 或动作生成场景。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能带来训练或推理基础设施上的效率改进。
